name: VIZSTRAT Ontology (Visual Strategy Artefacts & Deck Patterns)
description: Visual strategy artefact system: 9 single-artefact templates (One Slider, Use Case Map, Directional Costing, Priority Map, Technology Radar, Build/Buy/Partner, Due Diligence, Audit & Traceability, Architectural Definition), 6 deck patterns (Ghost, Ask, Strategy, Roadmap, Tactical Plan, Strategy Plan), deck composition, diagram patterns for Mermaid rendering, data source mapping to SA ontologies, audience views, skeleton diagrams for idea-to-execution, and artefact versioning. The capstone SC ontology — connects SA analysis through communication patterns to concrete deliverable artefacts. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SC sub-series.

components.VisualArtefact: Base entity for any rendered visual strategy output
components.ArtefactTemplate: One of 9 single-artefact template types with data source and audience mapping
components.DeckPattern: One of 6 composed deck patterns: ordered template sequences with narrative structure
components.DeckComposition: Ordered sequence of templates within a deck with transition guidance
components.DiagramPattern: Mermaid/graph diagram pattern mapping for each template type
components.DataSourceMapping: Mapping from SA ontology entities to visual artefact data inputs
components.AudienceView: Audience-appropriate detail level configuration for an artefact
components.ArtefactVersion: Versioned visual artefact for diff/evolution tracking across review cycles
components.SkeletonDiagram: Structural outline for idea-to-execution graph traversal

crossOntology.name: artefactRendersFromSA
crossOntology.purpose: Visual artefacts render from SA capstone direction summaries

crossOntology.name: deckUsesPattern
crossOntology.purpose: Decks use narrative communication patterns for structural approach

crossOntology.name: skeletonStartsFromQuestion
crossOntology.purpose: Skeleton diagrams start from a strategic question for idea-to-execution traversal

domain: Strategy Visualisation, Communication Artefacts, Decision Support

versionHistory.changes: Initial release — 9 Artefact Templates, 6 Deck Patterns, Diagram Patterns, Data Source Mapping, Skeleton Diagrams

notes: Layer C4 (Capstone) of VSOM Strategy Communication. Analogous to PORTFOLIO-ONT in VSOM-SA — touches the entire ontology graph. Bridges SA analysis data through SC communication patterns into concrete, audience-appropriate, versioned visual deliverables. 15 imports — the widest dependency graph in the ontology library.
